title: Software Update - DFU - Incoming softphone call during update
scenario: DFU continues and completes successfully when an incoming softphone call is received and answered during the firmware update process
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) by tapping 'Check for Update' or 'Update Now'.
5. While the DFU is in progress, receive an incoming softphone call (e.g., MS Teams, Skype) on the Android device.
6. Answer the incoming softphone call during the DFU process.
7. Monitor the DFU progress in the Poly Studio Mobile app after answering the call.
8. Wait for the DFU to either continue progressing or complete.
expected: The DFU continues running or completes successfully without interruption. The firmware update progress bar continues to advance, and the update finishes with a success message. The softphone call remains active and audio works normally.
